title: Raccoon Removal in Prospect Heights, Brooklyn
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Prospect Heights, Brooklyn. Safe, humane extraction from brownstones and residential properties. Licensed experts. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Raccoons in Prospect Heights are increasingly finding their way into historic brownstones, multi-family homes, and residential attics throughout this charming Brooklyn neighborhood. Our professional raccoon removal services provide safe, humane extraction and exclusion solutions tailored to Prospect Heights' unique architectural landscape. With pricing ranging from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, we offer comprehensive solutions to protect your property.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has over 15 years of experience serving Prospect Heights residents with specialized knowledge of Brooklyn's historic building structures and wildlife patterns. Our licensed technicians use humane removal methods, provide full attic restoration, and offer guaranteed exclusion work to prevent future raccoon entry into your home.
localContext: Prospect Heights' tree-lined streets, proximity to Prospect Park, and beautiful Victorian-era brownstones create ideal conditions for raccoon activity, especially near Grand Army Plaza and along Eastern Parkway. The neighborhood's mix of historic homes with aging rooflines and chimney structures often provides easy access points for these clever animals seeking shelter.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Prospect Heights?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Prospect Heights typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on factors such as the number of raccoons, location of the nest, extent of property damage, and whether babies are present. A complete inspection will provide an accurate estimate for your specific situation.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Prospect Heights brownstones?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons frequently inhabit Prospect Heights brownstones, particularly accessing attics through roof edges, chimneys, and ventilation openings. The neighborhood's mature trees and proximity to Prospect Park provide abundant raccoon populations that seek shelter in residential structures, especially during breeding season from late winter through spring.

faqs.question: Is raccoon removal humane and legal in Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: All our raccoon removal services in Prospect Heights follow New York State Department of Environmental Conservation guidelines and use humane, legal methods. We prioritize live trapping and relocation when appropriate, never separating mothers from dependent young, and ensure all work complies with Brooklyn's wildlife control regulations.

faqs.question: What damage can raccoons cause to my Prospect Heights home?
faqs.answer: Raccoons can cause significant damage to Prospect Heights homes including torn insulation, damaged electrical wiring, destroyed roof materials, and contaminated attics from urine and feces. They may also create entry holes that allow water infiltration and other pests, making prompt professional removal essential to protect your property value and structural integrity.
